# Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] New template
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Guide improvement
- [ ] Example improvement
- [ ] Fix typo or broken link

## Checklist

- [ ] File names are beginner-friendly.
- [ ] Rename instructions are clear when needed.
- [ ] Placeholders use square brackets, such as `[PROJECT_NAME]`.
- [ ] Links work.
